events.agenda: A 'dbt Labs on dbt' session giving a behind-the-scenes look at how dbt Labs' marketing team uses dbt for reporting.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data.
events.location: Venture X Dallas - Braniff Centre, 7701 Lemmon Ave Ste 260, Dallas, TX
events.raw_text:
Wed, Jul 31, 2024 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM CDT

Venture X Dallas - Braniff Centre, Dallas, TX

'dbt Labs on dbt' Meetup: Dallas

In the dbt Labs on dbt series, a behind-the-scenes look at how dbt Labs uses its own product. Speaker: Brandon Thomson, GTM Analytics Manager at dbt Labs, presenting Marketing Analytics @ dbt Labs.

talks.description: A behind-the-scenes look at how dbt Labs' own marketing team uses dbt for analytics and reporting.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 6:00-6:30 Marketing Analytics @ dbt Labs Presentation with Brandon Thomson
talks.title: Marketing Analytics @ dbt Labs

additional_metadata.note: Part of the dbt Global Circuit Series.

events.agenda: dbt Global Circuit Series stop covering a 30-day dbt implementation sprint methodology at Data Signify, and the latest tools from dbt Labs.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, designed for builders who want to learn from each other about the analytics engineering stack.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Jun 25, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM CDT

17746 Preston Rd, Dallas, TX

dbt Global Circuit: Dallas

Presentation 1: "30-Day dbt Sprint: Key Components That Make Implementation Lightning Fast" by Jethin Abraham (Co-Founder @ Data Signify).

Presentation 2: "For Builders, by Builders: The Latest Tools from dbt Labs" by Vincent Do (Principal Solutions Architect @ dbt Labs).

talks.description: The key components that make a 30-day dbt implementation sprint possible, based on Data Signify's methodology.
